text:
bug in macro variable uses into initial (banner) message gettytab

Fix: This is path for recovery small bug in macro variable uses into
initial (banner) message gettytab.

#ifdef __FreeBSD__
  #include <locale.h>
+ #include <sys/utsname.h>
  #endif
  #define PRINTOPTIONS
  #include "telnetd.h"
***************
putlocation = where;

***************


case '%':
                        putchr('%');--RXcqFK2ZDx7NkXfJztJJAG48GsOKyvMh0WdZmUKmT9X13lGp
